title: gh#56: R1.1 — Add Publisher interface + PublishFailure to @sms/shared
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/56.
Backlog section: Candidate 1 — Publisher seam.

## Context

First PR in Candidate 1 (Publisher seam deepening). Adds the new interface and failure type to `@sms/shared` with no callers yet. Subsequent PRs (R1.2–R1.5) wire up implementations and switch the worker over.

See [BACKLOG.md](../blob/main/BACKLOG.md) → Architectural Deepening → Candidate 1.

## Scope

- Add `packages/shared/src/publisher.ts` with:
  - `interface Publisher` — `publish(profile, post, ctx): Promise<PublishResult>`
  - `interface PublishablePost` — uniform projection of the Post row including `text`, `platform`, `isThread`, `visibility`, `linkUrl`, `media[]`
  - `interface MediaItem` — `{ id, kind: 'image'|'video'|'gif', bytes: Buffer, mimeType, fileName? }`
  - `interface PublishCtx` — `{ correlationId: string }`
  - `interface PublishResult` — `{ platformPostId: string }`
  - `class PublishFailure extends Error` — discriminated on `kind: 'permanent' | 'transient'`, plus `errorCode`, `httpStatus?`
- Re-export from `@sms/shared/src/index.ts`
- Unit tests covering `PublishFailure` construction + `instanceof` discrimination

## Out of scope

- Implementations of any concrete Publisher (R1.2, R1.3)
- Wiring changes to `publish-worker.ts` (R1.4)
- Deletion of old platform services (R1.5)
- TokenVault (deferred — see ADR-0002)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` passes
- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared test` passes
- No existing callers changed

## References

- ADRs: [0001](../blob/main/docs/adr/0001-publish-failure-is-thrown-not-returned.md), [0002](../blob/main/docs/adr/0002-publisher-receives-raw-profile-row.md)
- CONTEXT.md: \`Publisher\` domain term
- Depends on: nothing (first in Candidate 1 series)
